task_completion.visual_evidence: The SEB Server dashboard or interface is visible in the web browser.

task_completion.description: Create a new configuration named 'Music History Listening Exam'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A configuration named 'Music History Listening Exam' is visible in the list of configurations or in the configuration editor.
In the configuration settings, the checkbox or toggle for 'Allow spell checking' is unchecked or disabled.
In the Audio settings section, the 'Audio Control' option is checked or enabled.
In the Audio settings section, the 'Volume Level' input field or slider is set exactly to 80.
In the Audio settings section, the 'Mute Audio' option is unchecked or disabled.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser to interact with the SEB Server GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser window showing the SEB Server interface with active interactions.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to create the configuration via API.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows executing API requests (like curl) to localhost:8080.

integrity.description: The settings are configured in the actual SEB Server configuration forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Form fields, checkboxes, and sliders in the SEB Server web interface are used, rather than a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected configuration name is exactly 'Music History Listening Exam'. The required settings are: allowSpellCheck = false, audioControlEnabled = true, audioVolumeLevel = 80, audioMute = false.
